---
title: "scRNA Annotation Overview"
date: today
jupyter: python3
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-expand: 3
    toc-location: left
    html-math-method: katex
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
    html-table-processing: none
    theme: lumen
    fig-width: 10
    fig-height: 5
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
import sys

import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px
import scanpy as sc

LIB_DIR = Path(".").resolve() / "lib"
if str(LIB_DIR) not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, str(LIB_DIR))

from report_utils import format_table, load_report_context, load_table, package_versions_table

ROOT = Path(".").resolve()
context = load_report_context(ROOT)
adata = sc.read_h5ad(ROOT / context["adata_file"])


def embedding_frame(adata, basis: str, color_keys: list[str]) -> pd.DataFrame:
    coords = adata.obsm[basis]
    frame = pd.DataFrame(coords[:, :2], columns=["dim_1", "dim_2"], index=adata.obs_names)
    keep = [key for key in color_keys if key in adata.obs.columns]
    return frame.join(adata.obs[keep], how="left")


method_comparison = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["method_comparison"])
cluster_summary = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["cluster_annotation_summary"])
status_summary = load_table(ROOT, context["tables"]["annotation_status_summary"])
```

## Input Review

This overview report compares the selected annotation methods at a high level and summarizes which clusters still need manual review.

```{python}
overview_df = pd.DataFrame(
    [
        {"field": "input_h5ad", "value": context["input_h5ad"]},
        {"field": "input_source_template", "value": context["input_source_template"]},
        {"field": "selected_methods", "value": ", ".join(context["selected_methods"])},
        {"field": "cluster_key", "value": context["cluster_key"]},
        {"field": "n_cells", "value": int(adata.n_obs)},
        {"field": "n_genes", "value": int(adata.n_vars)},
    ]
)
format_table(overview_df)
```

## Method Comparison

```{python}
format_table(method_comparison)
```

## Review Status

```{python}
format_table(status_summary)
```

```{python}
format_table(cluster_summary)
```

## Final Labels

```{python}
final_plot_df = embedding_frame(
    adata,
    "X_umap",
    [
        context["final_label_key"],
        "annotation_status",
        context["cluster_key"],
        context["batch_key"],
        context["condition_key"],
        "sample_display",
        context["sample_id_key"],
    ],
)
px.scatter(
    final_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color=context["final_label_key"],
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", context["sample_id_key"], context["cluster_key"], context["batch_key"], context["condition_key"], "annotation_status"] if key in final_plot_df.columns],
    title=f"UMAP colored by {context['final_label_key']}",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

```{python}
px.scatter(
    final_plot_df,
    x="dim_1",
    y="dim_2",
    color="annotation_status",
    hover_data=[key for key in ["sample_display", context["sample_id_key"], context["cluster_key"], context["final_label_key"]] if key in final_plot_df.columns],
    title="UMAP colored by annotation review status",
    template="simple_white",
).update_layout(height=650)
```

## Session Info

```{python}
session_df = package_versions_table(["scanpy", "anndata", "pandas", "numpy", "plotly", "celltypist"])
format_table(session_df)
```
